reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern regarding the foreign transaction fee. We are reviewing the merchant location and will reverse the fee if the transaction was processed domestically. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account is locked after too many failed login attempts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. For security reasons, your account was temporarily locked. We will send a password reset link to your registered email to help you regain access immediately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I did not authorize this recurring charge.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized recurring charge. We have blocked the merchant from billing you further and will initiate a dispute for previous charges. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The payment link you sent is expired.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the expired link. A new payment link has been generated and sent to your registered email address. It will be valid for the next 24 hours. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received an overdraft fee even though I had enough funds.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the overdraft fee. We are reviewing the timing of the transactions and your available balance. If it was an error, the fee will be refunded. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: How do I get a statement for tax purposes?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can download your annual statement directly from the 'Documents' section in your online banking portal. If you need a custom date range, please contact us directly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am getting a 'card not supported' message at checkout.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. This error usually occurs if the merchant does not accept your card type or if 3D Secure verification failed. Please try an alternative payment method or contact the merchant. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My direct deposit is late.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand the importance of timely deposits. Direct deposits usually post by 9:00 AM on payday. If it is still missing, please provide the trace ID from your employer so we can track it. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to dispute a charge from last month.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have received your dispute request. A temporary credit will be applied to your account within 48 hours while we conduct a formal investigation with the merchant. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why is my payment showing as 'pending' for so long?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Pending transactions are authorizations that typically settle within 3-5 business days. If the merchant does not capture the funds, the hold will expire automatically. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am being charged a monthly fee that I was not told about.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion regarding the monthly fee. We will review your account type and fee waiver eligibility to see if this charge can be removed or refunded. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I lost my card. How do I stop payments?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have blocked your lost card to prevent further transactions. A replacement card has been ordered. Please review your recent transactions to confirm no unauthorized activity occurred. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment failed because of a 'limit exceeded' error.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. This error indicates you have reached your daily transaction or spending limit. You can request a temporary limit increase through the app or wait until the limit resets tomorrow. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I tried to send money via wire transfer but it didn't arrive.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Wire transfers can take 1-2 business days for domestic and 3-5 for international. If the timeframe has passed, we will initiate a trace to locate the funds. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an ATM fee even though I used an in-network machine.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the ATM fee. We have verified the ATM is in our network and will reverse the fee within 24 hours. Thank you for bringing this to our attention. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I returned an item but the merchant says they can't refund because it was too long ago.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your frustration. If the return was within the merchant's policy timeframe but they are refusing, we can assist you in filing a dispute for the transaction. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My bill pay check was never received by the payee.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize that the bill pay check did not arrive. We have stopped payment on the original check and will reissue a new one immediately via expedited shipping. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I'm receiving a 'risk block' error when trying to pay.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your transaction was flagged by our security system. We have verified your identity and removed the block. Please attempt the payment again in 30 minutes. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why is there a hold on my account for a hotel stay?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The hold is a pre-authorization from the hotel to cover potential incidentals. This is standard practice and will be released within 7-10 days after checkout. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I upgraded my plan but the price is higher than what was quoted.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are reviewing the pricing discrepancy. The quoted price should match the upgrade confirmation email. We will adjust your billing to reflect the correct amount going forward. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I can't see my transaction history in the app.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the display issue. Please ensure your app is updated. In the meantime, you can view your full history via the website. We are working on a fix. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My statement shows a charge from a company I don't recognize.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The charge may appear under a parent company name. If you do not recognize the merchant at all, we recommend locking your card and initiating a dispute. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a payment extension for my credit card bill.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand financial hardships can occur. We have noted your account for a payment extension without late fees for this billing cycle. Please let us know if you need further assistance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am trying to close my account but there is a pending transaction.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We cannot close the account until the pending transaction clears. Once it posts, please confirm the balance is zero, and we will proceed with the closure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why did my credit limit decrease?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Credit limits are periodically reviewed based on creditworthiness and usage. You will receive a formal notification regarding the change. If you believe this was an error, we can request a re-evaluation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an annual fee that I thought was waived.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the annual fee. We have reviewed your account and confirmed the waiver eligibility. The fee has been reversed and will reflect in 2-3 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I keep getting 'incorrect CVV' errors but I'm entering it correctly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. This can happen if the card is not present or if there is a mismatch with the address. Please verify the billing address matches our records. If the issue persists, we can issue a new card. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The payment confirmation email shows a different amount than the receipt.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are investigating the discrepancy between the confirmation email and receipt. Please provide screenshots so we can ensure the correct amount is charged. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I forgot to update my billing address and now my payment failed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. No problem. Please update your billing address in the account settings. Once updated, you can retry the payment, and it should process successfully. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was overcharged for shipping.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the shipping overcharge. We will review the shipping method selected versus the amount charged and issue a refund for the difference if applicable. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am getting an error that my payment method is 'invalid'.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The 'invalid' error usually indicates the card has expired or the account number was entered incorrectly. Please double-check the details or try a different card. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My paycheck was deposited into the wrong account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this is urgent. We will work with our back office to attempt a reversal of the misdirected deposit and move the funds to the correct account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am trying to set up autopay but the option is grayed out.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Autopay may be unavailable if there is a pending payment or a block on the account. We have enabled the feature on our end. Please log out and log back in to set it up. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received a collections notice for a bill I already paid.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the collections notice. We have confirmed your payment was received on [Date]. We are notifying the collections agency to retract the notice immediately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why is there a 'cash advance' fee on a regular purchase?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. If a purchase is processed as a cash equivalent (like gambling or money orders), it may incur a cash advance fee. We are reviewing the merchant code to verify the fee is correct. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a formal letter stating my account is in good standing.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can provide a 'Letter of Good Standing' for your records. This document will be available for download in the 'Messages' section within 1-2 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am traveling and my card keeps getting declined.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the inconvenience while traveling. We have added a travel notice to your profile. Please try the transaction again in 15 minutes. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My interest rate went up and I wasn't notified.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Rate changes are typically communicated 45 days in advance. We will review your account to ensure the proper notification was sent and explain the reason for the increase. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I paid off my balance but I'm still seeing interest charges.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion. Interest may be residual from the previous billing cycle. We will review your payment date and adjust any trailing interest if applicable. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My subscription renewed early and I was charged before the renewal date.
reply_text: Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We will review the subscription terms and issue a partial refund for the early renewal if it occurred outside the agreed billing cycle. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I'm unable to add my card to Apple Pay or Google Pay.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the difficulty. Please ensure your card is active and your device region matches your billing address. We can also verify if your card type supports mobile wallets. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received a fraud alert but the transaction was mine.
reply_text: Thank you for confirming the transaction was authorized. We have noted this on your account to prevent future false alerts. Your card remains active and secure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My statement is showing a negative balance.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. A negative balance indicates you have a credit on your account, usually due to a refund or overpayment. This credit will apply to future purchases or can be refunded to you upon request. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a convenience fee for paying online.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the convenience fee. This fee is assessed by the payment processor. We will confirm if there are alternative fee-free payment methods available. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited but the beneficiary says they haven't received the funds.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delay. The funds may be in transit. We will initiate a payment trace to confirm whether the funds have been credited to the beneficiary's account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am getting a 'transaction not permitted' error on my debit card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. This error can occur if your card has a merchant category block enabled. We will review your card controls and adjust any restrictions to allow the transaction. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to cancel a recurring payment I authorized.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can help you stop the recurring payment. Please provide the merchant name and the amount. We will place a stop payment on future charges from this merchant. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My bank statement doesn't match my accounting software.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the discrepancy. Please export your statement in the format compatible with your software. If there are missing transactions, we can verify them individually. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a returned payment fee even though the funds were available.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are reviewing the returned payment fee. If the funds were available at the time of the attempted debit, we will reverse the fee and reprocess the payment. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My child made unauthorized purchases on my card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this situation. While family member transactions are not typically fraudulent, we can discuss setting spending limits or exploring dispute options depending on the circumstances. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to view my e-statement online.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the difficulty accessing your e-statement. Please ensure you have consented to electronic statements. We will resend the latest statement to your secure inbox. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit score dropped after I paid off my loan.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the credit score change. Closing an installment account can temporarily affect your credit mix. We can provide resources to help explain the impact. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was promised a sign-up bonus but never received it.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing sign-up bonus. We are reviewing your account to ensure you met the qualifying criteria. Once confirmed, the bonus will be credited within 7-10 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment was applied to the wrong account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the misapplied payment. We have transferred the payment to the correct account and adjusted any late fees that may have resulted from this error. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving too many marketing emails from you.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the excessive emails. You can update your communication preferences in the 'Settings' section of your online banking profile to reduce marketing communications. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check deposit is on hold for too long.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the extended hold. Check deposits may be held for up to 7 business days for verification. We will review the hold and release the funds if verification is complete. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a dormant account fee.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have reversed the dormant account fee as a courtesy. To avoid future fees, please ensure there is at least one transaction or login activity every 12 months. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am trying to send a wire transfer but the recipient's bank details are incorrect.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We recommend verifying the recipient's details before initiating the wire. If the wire has already been sent with incorrect details, we will attempt to recall the funds immediately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My cashback rewards are not showing up.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are reviewing your cashback rewards balance. Rewards typically post within 1-2 billing cycles after the qualifying transaction. We will confirm the expected posting date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my legal name on the account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. To update your legal name, please provide a copy of the updated government-issued ID and legal documentation such as a marriage certificate or court order. We will process the change within 3 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am getting an error when trying to schedule a future payment.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the scheduling error. Please ensure the future date is within the allowed range. Our technical team is aware of this issue and is working on a resolution. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My monthly service fee was waived before but now it's being charged.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the service fee. The waiver may have expired or account requirements changed. We will review your account status and reapply the waiver if you still qualify. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received a 1099 form but I didn't earn that much interest.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the 1099 form. Please verify the interest earned across all accounts. If there is a discrepancy, we will issue a corrected form. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile check deposit was rejected.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The mobile deposit was likely rejected due to image quality or endorsement issues. Please ensure the check is endorsed with 'For Mobile Deposit Only' and retry with better lighting. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to transfer money between my accounts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the transfer issue. Please confirm the accounts are eligible for transfer and that you haven't exceeded daily transfer limits. We will investigate further if the issue persists. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment was posted after the due date but I paid on time.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the late posting. We will review the payment initiation time and date. If the payment was initiated on time, we will waive any late fees incurred. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a paper statement fee.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have reversed the paper statement fee for this month. To avoid future fees, please consider switching to paperless e-statements through your online banking profile. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was skimmed at an ATM.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear this. We have blocked your card to prevent further unauthorized use. A new card will be issued, and we will dispute any fraudulent transactions. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a higher daily withdrawal limit for an emergency.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand emergencies require access to funds. We have temporarily increased your daily withdrawal limit for the next 48 hours. Please let us know if you need further assistance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment confirmation number is not being recognized.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion. Please provide the confirmation number, and we will verify the payment status in our system and provide you with the updated confirmation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am being charged for a subscription I never signed up for.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized subscription. We have blocked this merchant from billing your card and will initiate a dispute for any charges you did not authorize. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My tax refund was deposited into a closed account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this is urgent. We will work to locate the deposited funds. If the account was closed, the deposit will typically be returned to the IRS within 5-7 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving alerts for transactions that are not mine.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the incorrect alerts. We are reviewing your alert settings and transaction history to ensure the alerts match your actual account activity. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My balance is incorrect after a recent transaction.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the balance discrepancy. We are reviewing the transaction ledger to ensure all credits and debits are accurately reflected. We will correct any errors promptly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a joint account holder.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. To add a joint account holder, both parties must visit a branch with valid identification. We can schedule an appointment for you at your convenience to complete this process. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card application was denied but my credit is excellent.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your frustration. Denials can be based on multiple factors beyond credit score. You will receive a letter with specific reasons. We can help review the criteria. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to access my account after updating the app.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the access issue after the update. Please try uninstalling and reinstalling the app. If the problem persists, we will help you reset your credentials. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was forged and cashed by someone else.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear about the forged check. We have placed a fraud alert on your account and will initiate an investigation. A provisional credit will be issued while we investigate. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to freeze my credit card temporarily.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can temporarily freeze your card through the mobile app under 'Card Management'. This will prevent new purchases while allowing recurring payments to continue if desired. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My auto loan payment was applied to principal instead of regular payment.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the misapplication. We will review your payment instructions and reapply the payment correctly. Please allow 2-3 business days for the adjustment to reflect. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving calls about a debt I already paid.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued collection calls. We have confirmed your payment and updated our records. The collection calls will cease within 24-48 hours. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My wire transfer was sent to the wrong beneficiary.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this is urgent. We have submitted a recall request for the wire transfer. While we cannot guarantee the return, we will make every effort to recover the funds. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using a non-network ATM but it was actually in-network.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the incorrect ATM fee. We have verified the ATM location and reversed the fee. Please allow 1-2 business days for the reversal to reflect in your account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My recurring payment was charged even after I updated my card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued charge to the old card. The merchant may have received updated card information through account updater services. We will help you block this recurring charge. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a copy of a check from three months ago.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can provide a copy of the cleared check. Please specify the check number and amount. The check image will be available in your secure messages within 3-5 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was credited for a dispute but now it's debited again.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the reversal. If the merchant successfully contested the dispute, the provisional credit may be reversed. We will provide the outcome documentation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to set up a PIN for my new card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the PIN setup difficulty. You can set your PIN through the automated phone system or at any of our ATMs. We can also mail PIN instructions to your address. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My balance transfer was not processed as requested.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the balance transfer delay. We are reviewing the request to ensure all required information was provided. We will process the transfer within 5-7 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an early withdrawal penalty from my CD.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the early withdrawal penalty. The penalty terms are outlined in your CD agreement. We can review if any exceptions apply to your situation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My business account is showing personal transactions.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the transaction mixing. Please review your account settings to ensure the correct default account is selected for your card. We will help separate any misposted transactions. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to dispute a charge that is over 60 days old.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have received your dispute request for the older transaction. While time limits may apply, we will investigate the charge and determine if we can still process the dispute. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My online banking session keeps timing out.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the session timeout issue. This is often related to browser settings or network connectivity. Please ensure cookies are enabled and try using a different browser. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was promised a promotional interest rate but it's not applied.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing promotional rate. We are reviewing your account to confirm enrollment in the promotion. Once verified, we will apply the correct interest rate retroactively. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment was credited to the wrong loan account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the misapplied payment. We have transferred the payment to the correct loan account and will ensure your payment history is accurately reflected. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to verify my identity for online access.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the verification difficulty. Please call our customer service line to complete identity verification with a representative who can manually assist with setup. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My cash deposit at an ATM was not credited.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing cash deposit. We will perform an ATM reconciliation and credit your account once the physical count confirms the discrepancy. This may take up to 5 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to change my billing cycle date.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can assist with changing your billing cycle date. Please note that changing the cycle date may result in a shorter or longer first billing period. Let us know your preferred date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit limit increase request was denied.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your disappointment. Credit limit decisions are based on income, credit history, and existing debt. You will receive a letter with specific reasons. You may reapply in 6 months. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged interest during the grace period.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the interest charge. The grace period applies only if the previous balance was paid in full. We will review your payment history and adjust any incorrect interest. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was hacked and money is missing.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are very sorry to hear this. We have immediately frozen your account to prevent further unauthorized access. We will investigate all transactions and restore any fraudulent debits. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to order checks for my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can order checks directly through online banking or by contacting our customer service. Standard checks typically arrive within 7-10 business days. Expedited shipping is available. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My refund was issued but the merchant is not processing it.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the merchant delay. If the merchant continues to delay the refund beyond their stated policy, we can assist you in filing a dispute for the transaction. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving duplicate statements in the mail.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the duplicate mailers. We have updated your statement delivery preference to ensure only one copy is sent. Please allow one billing cycle for the change to take effect. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My beneficiary did not receive the international transfer.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. International transfers may be delayed by intermediary banks. We have initiated a trace to track the funds. Please allow 5-7 business days for the trace results. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an insufficient funds fee but I had overdraft protection.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the insufficient funds fee. We are reviewing your overdraft protection settings. If the transfer should have covered the transaction, we will reverse the fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was closed due to inactivity.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the closure. Accounts may be closed after extended inactivity. If you wish to reopen the account, we can review your request and provide options. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my phone number for two-factor authentication.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can update your phone number for authentication. Please verify your identity by providing the one-time passcode sent to your existing number or by visiting a branch. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment plan was not set up correctly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the payment plan setup issue. We will review the terms and ensure your payment plan reflects the agreed schedule. Please allow 24 hours for updates. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a cashier's check that was never used.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cashier's check fee. If the check was never cashed and you have the original, we can refund the fee after the check is voided and returned to us. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My investment account is not showing accurate returns.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the discrepancy. Investment account valuations are updated based on market close. Please allow time for all trades to settle. We will verify the accuracy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to add a payee for bill payments.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the difficulty adding a payee. Please ensure the payee information is complete and matches their records. We can assist with adding the payee manually. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was charged before the merchant shipped the item.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. It is common for merchants to authorize charges at the time of order and capture funds upon shipment. The pending charge will remain until the transaction is completed or voided. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to convert my account to a different type.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can assist with converting your account type. Please review the features and fees of the new account. The conversion will take effect within 1-2 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My recurring donation was charged after I canceled it.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued donation charge. We have blocked the merchant and will process a refund for the charge that occurred after your cancellation request. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received a notification that my statement is ready but I can't find it.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing statement. The statement may be in your secure message center or documents folder. We will resend the statement to your registered email. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card rewards points expired unexpectedly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your frustration with the expired points. Rewards points typically expire after a period of inactivity. We will review if any points can be reinstated as a courtesy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for stopping payment on a check.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the stop payment fee. The fee covers the cost of placing and monitoring the stop payment order. We will review if the fee can be waived in this instance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a transaction that was declined.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the declined transaction that still posted. This is an authorization that will typically drop off within 3-5 business days. We will expedite the removal if possible. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to remove a deceased joint account holder.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry for your loss. To remove a deceased joint holder, please provide the death certificate. We will update the account ownership and provide any necessary assistance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My student loan payment is not showing as received.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing payment. Please provide the payment confirmation details. We will trace the payment and ensure it is applied to your loan account correctly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am being charged a monthly maintenance fee but I maintain a minimum balance.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the maintenance fee. We will verify your average monthly balance. If the minimum balance requirement was met, we will reverse the fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was declined for a small purchase but I have plenty of credit available.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the decline. This may be due to a merchant-specific block or fraud alert. We have reviewed your account and removed any restrictions. Please try again. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to dispute a charge that was made by a family member.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this is a sensitive situation. Transactions authorized by family members are not typically disputable. We can discuss alternative solutions such as adding authorized user controls. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mortgage payment was applied to escrow incorrectly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the misapplication. We will review your mortgage payment allocation and ensure funds are correctly distributed between principal, interest, and escrow. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to view my credit card agreement online.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the difficulty. The cardholder agreement is available in the 'Legal Documents' section. We can also email a copy directly to your registered address. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was stolen and cashed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear about the stolen check. We have placed a fraud alert and will initiate an investigation. Please provide any details about the missing check number and amount. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a late fee but my payment was on time.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the late fee. We have verified the payment receipt date and will reverse the fee immediately. Please allow 1-2 business days for the reversal to process. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My savings account interest rate is lower than advertised.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the rate discrepancy. Interest rates may vary based on account balance tiers. We will review your account to ensure you are receiving the correct rate. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to close my account but I have pending rewards.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand you wish to close your account while preserving rewards. Please redeem your rewards before closing, as unredeemed rewards may be forfeited upon account closure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile app is not showing the correct available balance.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the balance display issue. Please refresh the app or log out and back in. If the issue persists, we will verify the accurate balance in our system. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a foreign exchange fee that seems too high.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the concern. Foreign exchange fees are a percentage of the transaction amount and may include network fees. We will review the calculation for accuracy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My auto-payment was not deducted from my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missed auto-payment. We will investigate why the debit was not initiated and will process the payment manually to avoid any late reporting. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a new debit card expedited.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can expedite your debit card delivery. Please confirm your current address. Expedited shipping typically arrives within 2-3 business days and may involve a fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My cashier's check was lost in the mail.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the lost cashier's check. To issue a replacement, we require a declaration of loss. A bond may be required to protect against the original check being cashed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving error code XYZ when logging in.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the login error. This code typically indicates a temporary system issue. Please try again in 30 minutes. If the issue persists, we will investigate further. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a transaction that was refunded.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion. If the refund and debit are both showing, please allow time for both to settle. We will verify if the refund was processed correctly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a beneficiary to my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can add a beneficiary through our online form or by visiting a branch. Please provide the beneficiary's full name, date of birth, and relationship to you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card payment was returned by my bank.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the returned payment. Please verify the funding account had sufficient available funds. We can reprocess the payment once the issue is resolved. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am being charged a fee for paper statements I didn't request.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the paper statement fee. If you are enrolled in e-statements but still receiving paper copies, we will waive the fee and correct your delivery preferences. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My wire transfer was delayed due to compliance review.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delay. Wire transfers may be subject to compliance reviews for security. The review typically takes 24-48 hours. We will notify you once the funds are released. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my employer information for my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can update your employment information. Please provide your employer name, occupation, and annual income. This information helps us maintain accurate account records. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was charged for a subscription after I deleted the app.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued subscription charge. Deleting the app does not cancel the subscription. You must cancel directly with the merchant or through your account settings. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a balance transfer fee that I wasn't expecting.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unexpected balance transfer fee. The fee is typically a percentage of the transferred amount. We will review the fee disclosure provided at the time of transfer. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account shows a transaction pending for over a week.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the extended pending status. We will contact the merchant to confirm if they intend to capture the authorization or if the hold should be released. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to dispute a charge because the service was not as described.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can assist with disputing the charge. Please provide details about the service and your attempts to resolve the issue with the merchant. We will initiate the dispute process. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile deposit limit is too low.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand you need a higher mobile deposit limit. Mobile deposit limits are based on account history and tenure. We will review your account for a limit increase. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was opened without my consent.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We take unauthorized account openings seriously. We have flagged this for investigation and will close the account immediately if it was opened fraudulently. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to change my statement delivery from paper to electronic.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have updated your statement delivery preference to electronic only. You will receive an email notification when your next statement is ready to view online. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was charged for an extended warranty I didn't use.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the extended warranty charge. This may be a benefit that was automatically added. We will review and process a refund if the coverage was not requested. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to link my external account for transfers.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the linking difficulty. Please verify the external account details and that the account is in your name. Verification may take 2-3 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check deposit was credited but then reversed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the reversal. The check may have been returned by the issuing bank. We will provide details of the return and any associated fees. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to report a lost or stolen checkbook.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have reported your checkbook as lost/stolen and placed a stop payment on all unused checks. Please monitor your account for any unauthorized check activity. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mortgage escrow analysis shows a shortage.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the escrow shortage. We will explain the analysis and the options for paying the shortage either as a lump sum or spread over future payments. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card internationally.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the international fee. Some cards charge a foreign transaction fee for purchases made abroad or with foreign merchants. We will confirm your card's fee structure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My recurring payment was duplicated this month.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the duplicate recurring payment. We will reverse the duplicate charge and confirm with the merchant that future payments process correctly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my address for my credit card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have updated your mailing address for your credit card account. Please allow 7-10 business days for any mailed communications to reach your new address. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited after I closed it.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the debit to a closed account. We will investigate the transaction and issue a refund if the account was closed before the transaction date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving someone else's transaction alerts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the incorrect alerts. Please confirm your contact information and alert settings. We will ensure alerts are sent only for your account activity. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My interest calculation seems incorrect.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the concern about interest calculation. Interest is calculated based on the average daily balance. We will provide a detailed breakdown of the calculation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to cancel my account but I have automatic payments set up.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Before closing your account, please update automatic payments to a new account to avoid service interruptions. We will assist with the closure once payments are redirected. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was declined for a hotel reservation.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the decline. Hotels often place a pre-authorization hold. If the hold exceeded your available credit, the decline may occur. We can temporarily increase your limit. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a rush card replacement.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the rush fee. We have reviewed your request and will waive the rush fee as a courtesy. Your card will still be expedited as requested. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My business account is missing ACH deposits.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing ACH deposits. Please provide the expected deposit dates and amounts. We will trace the ACH transactions and confirm their status. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to set up a power of attorney on my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. To add power of attorney, please provide the completed POA document. We will review the document and add the authorized individual with appropriate access levels. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My statement shows a late fee but I have autopay enabled.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the late fee with autopay. We will verify if the autopay was successfully processed. If the payment was made on time, we will reverse the fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to transfer funds due to a security block.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the security block. This is a precaution to protect your account. We have verified your identity and removed the block. Please attempt the transfer again. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was charged for a free trial after it ended.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the charge after the free trial. Merchants typically require cancellation before the trial ends. We can assist with disputing the charge if you canceled timely. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a verification of deposit for my rental application.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can provide a verification of deposit letter. Please specify the timeframe and information required. The letter will be available within 2-3 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My cash advance was posted but I didn't receive the cash.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing cash advance. We will review the ATM or branch transaction details to confirm the cash was dispensed and address any discrepancies. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card at a gas pump.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the gas pump hold. Gas stations often place a temporary authorization that may appear as a fee. This hold will be replaced with the actual charge within days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a returned item fee.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the returned item fee. This fee is charged when a deposited item is returned unpaid. We will provide the reason for the return and any recourse options. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my tax withholding on my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. To update tax withholding, please complete the appropriate tax form available online or at a branch. We will update your account according to your instructions. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card payment was not applied to my balance correctly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the payment application issue. We will review the allocation of your payment to ensure it is correctly applied to your outstanding balance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving too many security alerts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the frequency of alerts. You can customize alert settings in your online banking profile to receive only critical security notifications. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My wire transfer was sent to the wrong country.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand this is concerning. We have submitted a correction request to the beneficiary bank. The outcome depends on whether the funds have been accepted by the recipient. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a stop payment that was not executed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the stop payment fee when the check was not stopped. We will reverse the fee and investigate why the stop payment order was not effective. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My savings account is showing a withdrawal I didn't make.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We take unauthorized withdrawals seriously. We have flagged the transaction and will investigate. Your account has been secured to prevent further unauthorized activity. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to close my account but I have a pending transaction.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We cannot close your account until the pending transaction clears. Once the transaction posts, please confirm the final balance to proceed with account closure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile app is not sending push notifications.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the notification issue. Please check your device settings to ensure notifications are enabled for the app. We will troubleshoot further if needed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was damaged and I need a replacement.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the damaged check. Please return the damaged check if possible. We can issue a replacement check or advise on alternative options. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a transfer that failed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the failed transfer fee. If the transfer failed due to a system issue, we will reverse the associated fee. We will investigate the cause of failure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was credited for a dispute but the merchant says I owe them.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand the confusion. The provisional credit is pending investigation. The merchant may contact you directly. We will provide the final dispute outcome once determined. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a second authorized user to my card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can add an authorized user through online banking or by contacting us. Please provide the user's full name, date of birth, and relationship to you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit limit was decreased without notice.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the lack of notification. Credit limit changes are typically communicated. We will review your account and provide the reason for the decrease. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment was posted after the statement closing date.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the posting timing. Payments posted after the closing date will apply to the next statement cycle. We will verify the payment received date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to access my account with biometric login.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the biometric login issue. Please use your password to log in. You can re-enable biometrics in settings after logging in successfully. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mortgage payment increased unexpectedly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We understand your concern about the payment increase. This may be due to escrow adjustments or interest rate changes. We will review the reasons for the change. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card at a foreign ATM.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the foreign ATM fee. This fee includes both network and international charges. We will review your card benefits to see if ATM fee reimbursements apply. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was charged for a service I did not sign up for.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized service charge. We will block the service provider from future billing and dispute the charges if they were not authorized. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my email address for account communications.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have updated your email address. All future account communications will be sent to the new address. Please verify the change by checking the confirmation email. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My rewards points are not posting for a recent purchase.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing rewards points. Rewards may take up to one billing cycle to post. We will verify the purchase qualifies for the rewards program. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was declined at a restaurant.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the decline at the restaurant. Please confirm the card was activated and that you have available credit. We have reviewed and cleared any blocks. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a duplicate annual fee.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the duplicate annual fee. We will reverse one of the fees immediately. The reversal will reflect in your account within 2-3 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account is showing a negative available balance.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the negative available balance. This may be due to pending transactions exceeding your available funds. We will review the account activity with you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to change my credit card payment due date.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can change your payment due date. Please note that changing the due date may affect the current billing cycle. We will confirm the new date once processed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My direct deposit was deposited into the wrong account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the misdirected deposit. We will work to recover the funds and move them to the correct account. Please confirm the intended account details. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving error messages when uploading documents.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the document upload issue. Please ensure the file size is under the limit and the format is supported. You may also email documents directly to us. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My cashback rewards were not applied to my statement.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing cashback. Rewards are typically applied as a statement credit. We will verify the rewards balance and ensure the credit is applied. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was charged a dormant account fee incorrectly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the dormant account fee. We will review the activity on your account. If there was activity within the period, we will reverse the fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to reset my PIN for my debit card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can reset your PIN at any of our ATMs or by calling our automated phone system. We can also mail PIN instructions to your address on file. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My balance transfer was not completed within the promotional period.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the transfer delay. We will review the request date and apply the promotional rate if the delay was due to processing on our end. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a replacement card I never ordered.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the replacement card fee. If you did not request a replacement, we will reverse the fee and investigate why a card was ordered. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was locked after I answered security questions incorrectly.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. For security, accounts are locked after failed verification attempts. We have unlocked your account. Please contact us if you need assistance with verification. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card APR increased without notice.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the APR increase. Rate changes are communicated in advance. We will review your account to ensure proper notification was provided. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to cancel my account due to fraud.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear about the fraud. We have closed the compromised account and opened a new one to protect your funds. We will assist with transferring automatic payments. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My payment was not recognized as on time because of the weekend.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the timing issue. Payments made on weekends or holidays are typically processed the next business day. We will review and adjust any late fees. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an over-limit fee but I have over-limit protection.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the over-limit fee. We will verify your over-limit protection settings. If the transaction should have been covered, we will reverse the fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account is showing a transaction from before I opened the account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the incorrect transaction date. This may be a system display error. We will verify the actual transaction date and correct the statement if needed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my beneficiary information.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can update your beneficiary information. Please provide the updated beneficiary details. We will confirm the changes once processed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was charged for a subscription I canceled months ago.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued subscription billing. We will block this merchant and dispute the recent charge. Please confirm the cancellation date if available. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to set up direct deposit with my employer.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can provide a direct deposit confirmation letter with your account and routing numbers. Please share this with your employer to complete the setup. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was returned due to a signature mismatch.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the returned check. Please verify the signature on file. We can update your signature card to prevent future mismatches. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a cash advance I did not request.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cash advance fee. We will review the transaction to confirm whether it was processed as a cash advance. We will correct any mis-categorization. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account shows a pending debit that is not mine.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized pending debit. We have flagged this transaction and will work to prevent it from posting. Please monitor your account for any further activity. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to change my account nickname in online banking.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can change your account nickname in online banking by selecting 'Account Settings' and editing the display name. This change will only affect your view. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mortgage statement shows the wrong interest paid amount.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the incorrect interest reporting. We will review your payment history and provide a corrected statement if necessary. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a late fee even though I have a grace period.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the late fee. The grace period applies to new purchases if the previous balance was paid in full. We will review your account to ensure accuracy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was not recognized when I tried to add it to a digital wallet.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the digital wallet issue. Please ensure your card is active and that the wallet supports your card type. We can verify card eligibility. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for an ATM withdrawal I did not make.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We take unauthorized ATM withdrawals seriously. We have blocked your card and will investigate the transaction. A provisional credit will be issued. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to request a payoff amount for my loan.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can provide a payoff amount valid for a specific period. Please specify the loan account and the desired payoff date. The quote will include principal and interest. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was charged for a warranty I declined.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the warranty charge. We will dispute this charge with the merchant. Please provide any documentation showing the warranty was declined. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to log in because I don't receive the verification code.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the verification code issue. Please confirm your phone number is correct. We can temporarily bypass verification with additional security questions. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My savings bond was cashed but not credited to my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing savings bond credit. We will trace the bond transaction and ensure the funds are properly credited to your account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using a teller for a basic transaction.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the teller fee. Some account types have limits on free teller transactions. We will review your account type and fee structure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was overdrawn due to a merchant error.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the overdraft caused by merchant error. We will review the transaction and reverse any overdraft fees if the merchant error is confirmed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to close my account and transfer funds to another bank.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can assist with closing your account. Please provide the receiving bank details. Funds will be transferred via wire or ACH after the account balance is confirmed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was charged for a pre-order that was canceled.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the charge on a canceled pre-order. Please provide proof of cancellation. We will dispute the charge with the merchant if the refund is not processed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving statements for an account I closed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the continued statements. We have updated our records to stop statement delivery for the closed account. No further statements will be sent. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile check deposit was accepted but then reversed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the reversal. The check may have been returned by the issuing bank. We will provide details about the return and any associated fees. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged an inactivity fee on my credit card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the inactivity fee. This fee applies when there is no purchase activity for a specified period. We will review if the fee can be reversed as a courtesy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a transaction that was voided.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the voided transaction that posted. The authorization may not have been released. We will work with the merchant to reverse the charge. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a stop payment on a range of checks.
