reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can place a stop payment on a range of checks. Please provide the starting and ending check numbers. A fee may apply for each stop payment order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was declined for a recurring payment.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the declined recurring payment. Please verify the card is not expired and that there is available credit. We will check for any blocks on recurring charges. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a returned deposit item.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the returned deposit fee. The fee is charged when a deposited check is returned unpaid. We will provide details about the return. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account is not showing the correct interest earned.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the interest discrepancy. Interest is typically posted at the end of the statement cycle. We will review the calculation and expected posting date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my legal name after marriage.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Congratulations on your marriage! Please provide your marriage certificate and updated ID. We will update your name across all accounts and issue new cards. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My wire transfer was rejected by the receiving bank.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the rejected wire. The receiving bank may have specific requirements. We will provide the rejection reason and assist with corrected instructions. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card at a discount store.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unexpected fee. Discount stores may have their own surcharge policies. We will verify if this was a merchant fee or a bank fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was frozen due to suspected identity theft.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are taking precautions to protect your identity. Please contact our fraud department to verify your information and restore account access. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to set up account alerts for large transactions.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can set up transaction alerts in online banking under 'Alert Settings'. Choose the threshold amount and notification method that works for you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card payment was reversed after being confirmed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the reversed payment. The payment may have been returned by your funding bank. Please verify the funding account had sufficient funds. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to view my full account number online.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. For security, full account numbers are masked online. You can find the full number on your statement or by contacting us directly for verification. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was altered and cashed for a higher amount.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear about the altered check. We have placed a fraud alert and will investigate. Please provide any details about the original check. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card internationally even though I have a no-fee card.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the international fee. We will review your card benefits to confirm if foreign transaction fees should apply. We will reverse any incorrect fees. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a payment I already made.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the duplicate payment. We will reverse the duplicate debit and ensure your account reflects the correct payment amount. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a trusted contact to my account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can add a trusted contact to your account. This person may be contacted if we have concerns about your financial well-being. Please provide their name and contact information. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile app is showing an incorrect transaction date.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the date display issue. Transaction dates reflect the posting date. We will verify the actual transaction date in our system. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card rewards were reduced without notice.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the rewards reduction. Rewards programs may change with notice. We will review your account for any changes to the rewards structure. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a balance inquiry at an ATM.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the balance inquiry fee. Some ATMs charge for inquiries. We will review if this fee can be waived based on your account type. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was charged for a service after I canceled.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the post-cancellation charge. We will dispute this charge and block the merchant from future billing. Please provide the cancellation confirmation if available. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to request a new checkbook.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can order a new checkbook through online banking or by contacting us. Standard delivery is 7-10 business days. Expedited shipping is available for a fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My statement shows a payment I did not authorize.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized payment. We have flagged this transaction and will investigate. Please review your recent activity for any other unauthorized items. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a stop payment that was never processed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the stop payment that was not effective. We will reverse the fee and ensure the check is properly stopped if it has not already cleared. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was overdrawn because of a hold I wasn't aware of.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the overdraft caused by a hold. We will review the hold details and reverse any overdraft fees if the hold was not properly disclosed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to change my password for online banking.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can change your password in the 'Security Settings' section. Please choose a strong password that is not used for other accounts. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was charged for a subscription I canceled during the free trial.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the subscription charge. We will dispute this charge with the merchant. Please provide confirmation of cancellation during the trial period. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am receiving collections calls for an account that is not mine.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the mistaken identity. We will investigate the account in question and update our records to stop collection calls regarding this account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check deposit was delayed due to a hold.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the deposit hold. The hold is placed to ensure the check clears. Funds will be available according to the hold schedule provided. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a cashier's check that was never picked up.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cashier's check fee. If the check was never picked up or has been voided, we will refund the associated fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was debited for a transaction that was refunded as store credit.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion. If the refund was issued as store credit rather than to your card, we may be able to assist with a dispute. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my account to a trust name.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. To update your account to a trust name, please provide the trust documents and identification. We will review and update the account ownership accordingly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My mobile app keeps crashing when I try to view transactions.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the app crash. Please ensure your app is updated to the latest version. If the issue persists, try reinstalling the app. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card limit was increased without my request.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We periodically review accounts for credit limit increases. If you prefer not to have the increase, we can revert to your previous limit. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card at a currency exchange.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the currency exchange fee. This transaction may have been processed as a cash advance. We will verify the merchant category code. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was charged a monthly fee I was not aware of.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unexpected monthly fee. We will review the fee disclosure provided at account opening and waive the fee if it was not properly disclosed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to request a lien release for my paid-off loan.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have processed the lien release for your paid-off loan. The release will be mailed to the address on file within 10-14 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My card was declined for an online purchase with sufficient credit.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the online decline. This may be due to the merchant's security requirements or a temporary block. We have reviewed and cleared any blocks. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for a transfer that I canceled.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the fee on a canceled transfer. If the transfer was canceled before processing, we will reverse the associated fee. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account is showing a duplicate pending transaction.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the duplicate pending transaction. One of the pending items will drop off when the transaction settles. Please monitor for the final posting. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to update my phone number for security alerts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have updated your phone number for security alerts. Please confirm the number is correct to ensure you receive important account notifications. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My credit card was charged for an annual fee after I closed the account.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the annual fee on a closed account. We will reverse the fee and confirm the account closure is complete. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I am unable to transfer money because the recipient is not in my contacts.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can add a new recipient by providing their account details. Once added, transfers can be initiated. Please ensure the recipient information is accurate. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My check was lost in the mail and I need to stop payment.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have placed a stop payment on the lost check. Please monitor your account to ensure the check does not clear. A stop payment fee may apply. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I was charged a fee for using my card at a government agency.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the government agency fee. Some government entities charge convenience fees for card payments. This fee is assessed by the agency. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My account was credited for a refund that was later reversed.
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the reversed refund. The merchant may have voided the refund. We will investigate and provide details about the reversal. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Where is my order? It has not arrived yet
reply_text: Thank you for reaching out. Your order is currently in transit and will be delivered soon. We appreciate your patience. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My delivery is delayed beyond the expected date
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delay in delivery. Our logistics team is working to resolve the issue and will ensure your order reaches you as soon as possible. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I want to change my delivery address
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your request to update the delivery address has been received. We will check if the change is possible and update you shortly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received the wrong item in my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We’re sorry for the inconvenience. Please initiate a return request, and we will arrange a replacement or refund for the incorrect item. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: When will my order be shipped?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your order is being prepared for shipment and will be dispatched soon. You will receive a notification once it has been shipped. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order shows as delivered but I haven't received it
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the confusion. Please check with neighbors or building management. If still not found, we will investigate with the delivery partner immediately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I cancel my order? It hasn't shipped yet
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have received your cancellation request. Since the order has not yet shipped, we will process the cancellation and initiate a full refund. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking link is not working
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the tracking issue. Sometimes tracking updates take 24 hours to reflect. We will share a manual status update for your order shortly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My package was left in an unsafe location
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery experience. We will provide feedback to the delivery partner. For valuable items, we recommend selecting signature-required delivery in the future. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to return an item. How do I proceed?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can initiate a return through your order history. Select the item and reason for return. A pickup will be scheduled at your convenience. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order is stuck at a facility for days
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delay at the facility. Our logistics team has been notified and will expedite the movement of your package. We will update you within 24 hours. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I entered the wrong shipping address
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have noted your address correction request. We will attempt to update the address with the carrier. If the package has already shipped, it may be redirected. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: When will my return pickup happen?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your return pickup has been scheduled. You will receive a notification with the pickup date and time window. Please keep the item ready with original packaging. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order arrived damaged
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear that your item arrived damaged. Please upload photos of the damage through our return portal, and we will arrange a replacement or refund immediately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I combine shipping for multiple orders?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can attempt to combine your orders if they are still in processing status. Please provide the order numbers, and we will check if consolidation is possible. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why was my order cancelled?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cancellation. This may have occurred due to stock unavailability or payment verification issues. We can help you place a new order if the item is still available. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need expedited shipping for my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have requested expedited shipping for your order. The updated delivery timeline will be shared once confirmed by the logistics team. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order confirmation email never arrived
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have resent your order confirmation email. Please also check your spam folder. You can view all order details in your account order history. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The delivery driver did not ring the bell
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missed notification. We will share this feedback with the delivery partner to ensure proper communication during future deliveries. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I schedule a specific delivery time?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can request a specific delivery time window from the carrier. Please share your preferred time, and we will do our best to accommodate the request. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was returned to sender
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We see that the delivery was unsuccessful and the package is being returned. Once received at our facility, we will issue a refund or arrange reshipment as you prefer. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received only part of my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the partial delivery. The remaining items may be shipping separately. We will verify the shipment status and provide tracking for the pending items. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: How do I track my return?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. You can track your return status in your order history. Once the return is received and inspected, we will process your refund or replacement. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order has been in processing for a week
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the extended processing time. We are reviewing the status with our warehouse and will provide an update on expected shipment within 24 hours. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add gift wrapping to my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have added gift wrapping to your order. The updated order total will reflect the gift wrapping charge. Please confirm if you would like to proceed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking shows delivered but I have no package
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing package. We will open an investigation with the delivery carrier. Please allow 2-3 business days for the investigation to complete. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I change my shipping method after ordering?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We will check if the shipping method can be changed before dispatch. Please let us know your preferred shipping method, and we will confirm availability. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order says out for delivery but it's late
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize that your delivery is taking longer than expected. The carrier may be experiencing delays. We are monitoring the status and will update you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received someone else's order by mistake
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the mix-up. We will arrange a pickup for the incorrect order and ship your correct order immediately. Please keep the incorrect item sealed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: When will my pre-order ship?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your pre-order is expected to ship on the release date. You will receive tracking information once the item is dispatched from our warehouse. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need a copy of my invoice for warranty purposes
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have attached a copy of your invoice to this email. You can also download it from your order history at any time. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was supposed to be gift wrapped but it wasn't
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing gift wrapping. We will refund the gift wrapping fee and ensure any future orders include this service if requested. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I intercept my package before delivery?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We will attempt to intercept the package with the carrier. If successful, we will redirect it to your preferred address or hold it for pickup. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The size I received doesn't match what I ordered
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the size discrepancy. Please initiate a return, and we will expedite a replacement in the correct size as soon as we receive the return. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order is missing a part or accessory
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing accessory. We will ship the missing part separately at no additional cost. Please confirm the specific item that was missing. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Why is there a hold on my credit card for this order?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The hold is a pending authorization that will convert to a charge when your order ships. If the order was cancelled, the hold will be released within 3-5 business days. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to split my order into multiple shipments
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can split your order into multiple shipments if the items are in different warehouses. Please confirm which items you would like shipped separately. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My package was stolen after delivery
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We are sorry to hear about the stolen package. Please file a police report if possible. We will work with the carrier and explore available options. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I pick up my order from a local store?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have changed your delivery method to in-store pickup. You will receive a confirmation when your order is ready for collection at your selected store. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The delivery required a signature but no one was home
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We see the delivery attempt was unsuccessful due to signature requirement. You can reschedule delivery through the carrier's portal or request pickup at their facility. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order shows as shipped but no tracking updates
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Tracking information may take up to 48 hours to reflect after shipment. We will check with the carrier and provide an update if no movement appears. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received a defective product
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the defective item. Please initiate a return and select 'defective' as the reason. We will expedite a replacement once the return is processed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: How do I add a gift receipt to my order?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have added a gift receipt to your order. The recipient will receive a receipt without pricing details to facilitate returns if needed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was cancelled but I still want the item
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cancellation. The item may be out of stock. We can notify you when it becomes available or suggest a similar alternative. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The delivery address is incorrect in the confirmation email
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Please confirm the correct shipping address. We will update our records and notify the carrier if the package has not yet shipped. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I return an item without the original packaging?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can accept returns without original packaging in most cases. Please ensure the item is securely packed to prevent damage during return shipping. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was shipped to an old address
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the address issue. We will attempt to contact the carrier for a redirect. If delivery has already occurred, we will help with next steps. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: When will my backordered item ship?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Backordered items typically ship within 2-3 weeks. You will receive an email notification with tracking once the item is available and dispatched. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to cancel one item from my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have cancelled the specific item from your order. You will only be charged for the remaining items. The cancellation will reflect within 24 hours. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My package shows delivered to the wrong city
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery error. We will investigate with the carrier immediately and work to locate your package or issue a replacement. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I add items to an existing order?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We cannot add items to existing orders once processing has begun. Please place a separate order, and we will combine shipping if both orders are still in processing. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The return pickup was missed
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missed pickup. We have rescheduled the return pickup for the next available date. Please ensure the item is ready for collection. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order status hasn't updated in days
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the lack of updates. We are checking with the warehouse and carrier to confirm the current status of your order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to provide delivery instructions for the driver
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have added your delivery instructions to the order. Please note that while we share these with the carrier, we cannot guarantee all instructions will be followed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was marked as delivered but the photo shows a different house
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery error. We see the delivery photo does not match your address. We will open an investigation and arrange a replacement. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: How long does standard shipping take?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days for delivery. You will receive tracking information once your order ships. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I received an extra item in my order
reply_text: Thank you for your honesty. Please keep the extra item as our gift. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I refuse delivery of a package?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Yes, you can refuse delivery when the carrier attempts delivery. The package will be returned to us, and we will process a refund upon receipt. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to verify that my return was received
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We confirm your return was received at our warehouse on [date]. Processing will take 3-5 business days. You will receive an email once completed. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was damaged during return transit
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the damage during return. We will still process your refund as the damage occurred in transit. Please provide photos for our records. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking shows my package is in a different state
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the routing error. The carrier may have misrouted your package. We are working to correct the delivery path and minimize delays. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was placed but I never received confirmation
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have resent your order confirmation. Please check your spam folder. If still not received, please verify your email address in your account. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to cancel a return pickup that was scheduled
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have cancelled your return pickup. No further action is required. Your original order remains active. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was supposed to be a surprise but delivery alerts ruined it
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the spoiled surprise. We recommend selecting 'no delivery notifications' for future gift orders to avoid alerts. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The delivery driver did not follow my delivery instructions
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize that instructions were not followed. We will provide feedback to the carrier to improve adherence to delivery preferences. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order contains multiple items but I only received one
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We see your order was split into multiple shipments. The remaining items are in transit with separate tracking numbers. You should receive them shortly. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I get a replacement for a lost package?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have initiated a replacement for your lost package. The replacement will ship once the carrier confirms the original as lost. Tracking will be provided. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to know the carrier's contact information
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The carrier for your order is [carrier name]. You can reach them at [phone number] with your tracking number for status updates. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order shows as processing but the payment went through
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your payment has been authorized. The order will move to shipping once processing is complete. We appreciate your patience during this time. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The return label I printed is not scanning
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the label issue. A new return label has been generated. Please print and use this label for your return. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was delivered but I need a different size
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Please initiate a return for the original size. Once processed, we will ship the replacement size. We can expedite this process for you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to add a gift message to my order
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have added your gift message to the order. The message will be included in the packing slip. Please confirm the exact wording you would like. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My package was left in a location I didn't specify
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the unauthorized delivery location. We will share this feedback with the carrier to ensure packages are left only in approved locations. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I return an item without the tags?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can accept returns without tags in most cases. Please ensure the item is in original condition. We will process the return normally. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was supposed to have a free sample but it's missing
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing sample. We will ship a replacement sample if available, or provide a small credit as compensation. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking shows my package was delivered to a locker but I don't have code
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing locker code. The carrier should have sent it separately. We will request the code and forward it to you. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to know the weight of my package for shipping
reply_text: Thank you for your message. The package weight is [weight]. Please let us know if you need this information for shipping or receiving arrangements. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was cancelled due to address verification
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the cancellation. The address provided could not be verified. Please confirm your full address, and we will assist with a new order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The return pickup driver never arrived
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missed pickup. We have rescheduled the return pickup. Please ensure the item is ready for the new date. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order shows as delivered but I requested vacation hold
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery despite the vacation hold. We will investigate with the carrier and work to resolve this issue. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I get a partial refund for a delayed expedited order?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize that expedited shipping did not meet the timeline. We have processed a refund for the expedited shipping cost as a courtesy. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was placed with a guest account, can I still return?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Yes, you can still return items from guest orders. Please use the order number from your confirmation email to initiate the return. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The delivery required a signature but the driver left it anyway and it was stolen
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the signature waiver that led to theft. We will file a claim with the carrier and process a replacement for your order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to know if my order will require a signature
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Your order does not currently require a signature. If you would like to add signature requirement, please let us know, and we will update the delivery. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My return was processed but I didn't get an email confirmation
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We have resent the return confirmation email. Your return is complete, and the refund has been processed. Please check your spam folder. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking shows my package is in customs clearance for weeks
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the extended customs clearance. We are working with the carrier to understand the delay and expedite the process. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was shipped with the wrong carrier
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the carrier change. The tracking number is still valid. If you have issues with this carrier, please let us know. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to return an item but I'm outside the country
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We can assist with international returns. Please note that return shipping costs and customs may apply. We will provide instructions for your location. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order shows as delivered but the photo is not my house
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery photo mismatch. We will open an investigation with the carrier and work to locate your package or issue a replacement. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I change my order to a different product?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We will check if the product can be changed before shipment. Please provide the new product details, and we will confirm availability. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The return shipping cost was not refunded
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing return shipping refund. If the return was due to our error, we will refund the shipping cost. We have processed this now. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was delivered but I wasn't notified
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missing delivery notification. We will update your notification preferences to ensure you receive future delivery alerts. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: I need to know if my order is eligible for same-day delivery
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Same-day delivery is available for select locations and items. Please provide your zip code, and we will check eligibility for your order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: The tracking shows my package was delivered to a different city
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the delivery error. We will investigate with the carrier immediately and work to resolve this misdelivery. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was placed but I want to change the color
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We will check if the color can be changed before shipment. Please provide the desired color, and we will confirm availability and update your order. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: Can I return a personalized item?
reply_text: Thank you for your message. Personalized items are typically non-returnable unless defective. If there is an issue with the personalization, please contact us directly for assistance. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.

input_text: Customer Query: My order was supposed to be delivered on a specific date for a gift
reply_text: Thank you for your message. We apologize for the missed gift delivery. We will refund the shipping cost and offer a discount on your next purchase for the inconvenience. Please let us know if you need any further assistance.
